---
title: "About me"
image: RohanContra.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rohnshinge@gmail.com
---

I am an analytics professional with a passion for building end-to-end data solutions that bridge complex backend engineering with high-level strategic insights. My expertise lies in architecting robust measurement frameworks, automating reporting workflows and driving data integrity to support executive decision-making. 

I have the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, high-volume, and deadline-driven environment with experience in data manipulation and statistical tools such as SQL, R, Python, and Tableau. Being an applied data analyst, I understand the math behind statistical models and work to ensure deliverables are of the highest quality. 

I am driven by complex problem-solving - whether it is debugging a critical datasource error, projecting revenue impacts through sandbox analysis or mentoring peers on SQL and dashboarding best practices. I am constantly expanding my toolkit, recently focusing on GenAI applications and advanced statistical modeling to drive the next generation of analytics.
